label: 空场景
description: 无任何输入，输出一个空场景：只含一个空的根节点（children 为空）的 scene DataTree。用作管线起点、占位源或在其下挂接子节点构建完整 scene 树。
description-en: No inputs; emits an empty scene: a scene DataTree containing only one empty root node (no children). Useful as a pipeline source, placeholder, or a root to graft child nodes onto.

outputs.name: scene
outputs.label: scene
outputs.description: 空场景：只有一个空根节点（children 为空）的 DataTree，focus 指向根 '/'
outputs.description-en: Empty scene: a DataTree with a single empty root node (no children), focus on root '/'.
